name: Sliplane
description: Simple container hosting platform with predictable flat-rate pricing and zero server operations for Docker apps.

seo.title: Sliplane — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Sliplane: Simple container hosting platform with predictable flat-rate pricing and zero server operations for Docker apps.

when_to_use: Simple flat-rate container hosting without Kubernetes complexity
Deploying Docker apps with zero server operations knowledge
Predictable pricing for containerized web services
Heroku-like simplicity without per-dyno billing overhead
Managed hosting for side projects and small SaaS apps

review.verdict: Refreshingly simple flat-rate container host, but small-vendor risk is real for production bets.
review.best_for: Indie devs and small teams wanting predictable container hosting without per-resource billing
review.not_for: Enterprises, global-scale apps, or teams needing managed databases bundled
